priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: multi-user corroboration, regression tied to recent release, high similarity to price/numeric bugs, no crash or full outage confirmed
severity_justification: Multiple users have independently corroborated the issue and it appears tied to a specific release on Tuesday, suggesting a regression rather than a one-off. The high similarity to FLIPPI-1663 (checkout price discrepancy, P0, sim 0.45) and FLIPPI-1228 (price mismatch, P1, sim 0.42) indicates this likely involves numeric/price data, which is core to the shopping value proposition. The ambiguity in component and platform prevents a P0 call, but the multi-user corroboration and release-correlation lift it above P2.
owner_reason: Veeramreddy ChakradharReddy is the assignee on 3 of the top 5 similar numerical-discrepancy bugs (FLIPPI-1228, FLIPPI-1679, FLIPPI-1794), making them the most likely owner for a vague number-display regression.
